name: WhoisXML API
description: WhoisXML API provides comprehensive domain and IP intelligence including WHOIS records, DNS lookup, domain availability, reverse WHOIS, IP geolocation, and domain reputation data across 374M+ active domains.

actions.name: WHOIS Lookup
actions.description: Retrieve parsed WHOIS registration data for a domain including registrant, registrar, creation date, expiration date, name servers, and status codes.

parameters.name: domainName
parameters.description: The domain name to look up (e.g., 'example.com')

actions.name: DNS Lookup
actions.description: Perform DNS lookups to retrieve A, AAAA, MX, NS, TXT, SOA, CNAME, and other DNS records for a domain.

parameters.name: domainName
parameters.description: The domain name to query DNS records for

actions.name: WHOIS History
actions.description: Retrieve historical WHOIS records for a domain showing ownership changes, registrar transfers, and status modifications over time.

parameters.name: domainName
parameters.description: The domain name to look up historical WHOIS for

parameters.name: mode
parameters.description: Set to 'purchase' to retrieve historical records

actions.name: Reverse WHOIS
actions.description: Find all domains registered by a specific person, company, or email address by searching across WHOIS registration data.

parameters.name: basicSearchTerms
parameters.description: Search terms object containing 'include' array of keywords to search for in WHOIS records

actions.name: Domain Availability
actions.description: Check whether a domain name is available for registration or currently registered.

parameters.name: domainName
parameters.description: The domain name to check availability for

parameters.name: da
parameters.description: Set to 2 to enable domain availability check mode

actions.name: IP Geolocation
actions.description: Get geolocation data for an IP address including country, region, city, coordinates, ISP, and organization.

actions.name: Domain Reputation
actions.description: Get a reputation score for a domain based on multiple threat intelligence factors including malware, phishing, and spam indicators.

parameters.name: domainName
parameters.description: The domain name to check reputation for
